text: Some people think football is a matter of life and death. I assure you, it's much more serious than that.
author: Bill Shankly

text: The ball is round, the game lasts 90 minutes, and everything else is just theory.
author: Sepp Herberger

text: A penalty is a cowardly way to score.
author: Pelé

text: You can't score a penalty if you don't take one.
author: Johan Cruyff

text: The hand of God.
author: Diego Maradona

text: When people succeed, it is because of hard work. Luck has nothing to do with success.
author: Diego Maradona

text: I am not a perfectionist, but I like to feel that things are done well.
author: Zinedine Zidane

text: You have to fight to reach your dream. You have to sacrifice and work hard for it.
author: Lionel Messi

text: I don't think about one trick or one shot. For me, it is about the whole game.
author: Ronaldo Nazário

text: Talent without working hard is nothing.
author: Cristiano Ronaldo

text: I always want more. Whether it's a goal, or winning a game, I'm never satisfied.
author: Lionel Messi

text: The more difficult the victory, the greater the happiness in winning.
author: Pelé

text: I learned all about life with a ball at my feet.
author: Ronaldinho

text: Football is the ballet of the masses.
author: Dmitri Shostakovich

text: The World Cup is a very important way to measure the good players, and the great ones.
author: Pelé

text: In his life, a man can change wives, political parties, or religions. But he cannot change his favourite football team.
author: Eduardo Galeano

text: Every time I went away I was deceiving my mum. I'd tell her I was going to school but I'd be playing football.
author: Ronaldo Nazário

text: The goalkeeper is the jewel in the crown and getting at him should be almost impossible.
author: George Graham

text: I once cried because I had no shoes to play football, but one day I met a man who had no feet.
author: Zinedine Zidane

text: Football is a simple game. Twenty-two men chase a ball for 90 minutes and at the end, the Germans always win.
author: Gary Lineker

text: If you're in the penalty area and don't know what to do with the ball, put it in the net.
author: Bob Paisley

text: To win you have to score one more goal than your opponent.
author: Johan Cruyff

text: The vision of a champion is bent over, drenched in sweat, at the point of exhaustion, when nobody else is looking.
author: Mia Hamm

text: I'm living a dream I never want to wake up from.
author: Cristiano Ronaldo

text: You eat, sleep, drink football. It's in your blood.
author: Thierry Henry

text: Football is like life — it requires perseverance, self-denial, hard work, sacrifice, dedication.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: I'm not the best penalty taker, but I always volunteer. That says something.
author: Frank Lampard

text: Penalties are the cruellest way to decide a football match. And the most exciting.
author: Roberto Baggio

text: When I missed that penalty, I wanted the ground to open up and swallow me.
author: Roberto Baggio

text: The secret is to believe in your dreams; in your potential that you can be like your star.
author: Neymar

text: There is no pressure when you are making a dream come true.
author: Neymar

text: One day they'll say, 'He could have been the best in the world but he kept missing penalties.'
author: Gareth Southgate

text: A World Cup without me is nothing to watch.
author: Zlatan Ibrahimović

text: I don't have time for hobbies. At the end of the day, I treat my job as a hobby.
author: Luka Modrić

text: Behind every kick of the ball there has to be a thought.
author: Dennis Bergkamp
